faqs.question: What are the best family holiday parks in Dunsborough, WA?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars Holiday Park is the top choice for families, offering extensive facilities including pools, playgrounds, and entertainment programs. For beach-focused stays, Tasman Holiday Parks at Yallingup Beach provides direct beach access just 15 minutes away. Sandy Bay Holiday Park offers a quieter alternative with good amenities. All three cater specifically to families with children's activities and family-friendly layouts.

faqs.question: Which caravan park in Dunsborough is best for kids?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars excels for children with dedicated playgrounds, heated pools, jumping pillows, and organized kids' clubs during school holidays. The park's layout keeps children entertained throughout the day. Tasman Holiday Parks at Yallingup Beach also provides beach entertainment plus rock pools for exploring marine life, appealing to adventurous kids.

faqs.question: Are there holiday parks with pools near Dunsborough?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars features heated pools and water play areas—essential for Dunsborough's cooler months. Tasman Holiday Parks locations also provide pools. All parks offer year-round swimming facilities, with BIG4 being particularly comprehensive for families seeking multiple aquatic amenities and temperature-controlled water.

faqs.question: What holiday parks are near beaches in Dunsborough?
faqs.answer: Tasman Holiday Parks - Yallingup Beach offers beachfront access with direct sand access perfect for families. Sandy Bay Holiday Park sits near protected swimming beaches. BIG4 Southern Stars is a 10-minute drive to Geographe Bay beaches. Tasman Holiday Parks - Yallingup Caves, though cave-focused, provides beach access within 15 minutes for day trips.

faqs.question: Which Dunsborough parks have powered caravan sites?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars offers extensive powered sites with modern amenities and good spacing for families. All four parks—BIG4, both Tasman locations, and Sandy Bay—provide powered caravan sites with full hookups. BIG4 offers the most powered options and best facilities for longer stays with larger caravans.

faqs.question: What cabin options are available in Dunsborough holiday parks?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars offers diverse cabin types from budget-friendly options to premium family villas with ensuites. Tasman Holiday Parks provides cabin accommodations at both Yallingup locations. Sandy Bay Holiday Park has cabin choices. All parks offer non-camping alternatives for families preferring traditional accommodation without setup requirements.

faqs.question: Are there pet-friendly holiday parks in Dunsborough?
faqs.answer: Most Dunsborough parks accommodate pets in specific areas—check individual policies when booking. BIG4 Southern Stars and Sandy Bay Holiday Park have designated pet-friendly zones. Tasman locations vary by property. Pets typically require advance notice and may incur additional fees. Call ahead to confirm your specific pet is welcome and any restrictions apply.

faqs.question: Which holiday park offers best value in Dunsborough?
faqs.answer: Sandy Bay Holiday Park typically provides competitive rates while maintaining good facilities. Off-season visits (April-September) offer better rates across all parks. BIG4 offers value packages including entertainment, making it cost-effective for active families. Compare powered vs. unpowered sites—savings vary depending on your setup needs and visit duration.

faqs.question: What's the best area to stay in Dunsborough for families?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars is centrally located, providing easy access to attractions while offering comprehensive on-site entertainment. For beach-loving families, Tasman's Yallingup Beach location offers coastal living. The Margaret River region nearby has wineries, breweries, and family attractions. Dunsborough town center is accessible from all parks within 10-15 minutes.

faqs.question: What are rainy day activities for kids in Dunsborough?
faqs.answer: Indoor options include Margaret River Discovery Centre, Yallingup Caves (15 minutes away), and the Lake Cave. Most parks have game rooms, movie nights, and kids' clubs. Dunsborough Visitor Centre provides activity suggestions. Many accommodations have enclosed entertainment areas. The region's caves offer year-round exploration regardless of weather conditions.
